title: button-stepper widget params
description: Shared renderer for the button-stepper-svg and button-stepper-text families (~47 widgets): an SVG (or HTML-only) host plus one or more <button> elements wired to step/reset/next/prev/custom actions. Markup is assembled from a structured `layout` array of block descriptors (svg, row, readout, raw); portable consumers can drive their own UI from that data and the `buttons` action list alone. The `bodyScript` field is an ARTIFACT: the verbatim JS body of the driving IIFE, preserved byte-for-byte so the vanilla-HTML frontend round-trips exactly. Single-mode schema (no oneOf yet); later passes add linear-stepper and branching-machine variants.

widgetId.description: DOM id for the outer <div class="widget"> wrapper.

title.description: Display title rendered inside .hd > .ttl (and also copied into any <svg><title>…</title> whose titleText is omitted).

titleTag.description: Tag used for the .ttl header element inside .hd. Default 'div' emits <div class="ttl">; 'span' emits <span class="ttl"> (a layout sub-variant in some legacy topics).

hintTag.description: Tag used for the .hint header element inside .hd. Default 'div'; 'span' pairs with titleTag='span' in the span-header layout sub-variant.

hint.description: Optional short hint rendered inside .hd > .hint. When absent, the .hint span is omitted entirely.

svgId.description: Convenience mirror of the primary SVG's id. Portable consumers may use this; the vanilla renderer reads svg blocks from `layout`.

viewBox.description: Convenience mirror of the primary SVG's viewBox. Same note as svgId.

readoutId.description: Convenience mirror of the primary readout block's id (when present).

buttons.description: Flat list of every button declared in `layout`, in DOM order, annotated with an action. Portable consumers can drive alternative UIs from this alone; the vanilla renderer ignores this list and reads buttons from `layout`.

stepCount.description: Optional linear-stepper state size. Implies step indices 0..stepCount-1.

steps.description: Optional sequence of named states for a discrete stepper. Each entry is an opaque object whose shape depends on the widget's draw logic.

sectionComment.description: Raw text placed between `<script>` and `(function(){` as `/* <here> */`. Preserves the original source's section banner (e.g. 'SECTION 2 widget' padded with equals signs). Portable consumers can ignore.

bodyScript.description: ARTIFACT. The verbatim JS body that sits inside the `(function(){ … })();` IIFE of the driving <script>. Preserved byte-for-byte so the vanilla-HTML renderer can reproduce the original source. A portable frontend can ignore this field and drive its own renderer from `buttons`, `layout`, `steps`/`stepCount`.

layout.description: Ordered list of inner-widget block descriptors. Each block renders one top-level child of the widget div (after the .hd header, which is auto-generated from `title`/`hint`). Block kinds: 'svg', 'row', 'readout', 'raw'.

id.description: Optional DOM id. Use this OR dataAttr for click targeting; some widgets key off one, some off the other.

className.description: Optional class attribute (commonly 'active' for the default-selected button).

action.description: Portable intent marker: one of 'step' | 'reset' | 'next' | 'prev' | <custom>. Consumed by portable frontends; vanilla markup is unaffected.

titleText.description: Override for the <title> element's text content. Defaults to the widget's `title` when omitted.

content.description: Initial inner text/HTML. When omitted the readout renders empty.

html.description: ARTIFACT. Raw bytes inserted verbatim (with a leading two-space indent and trailing newline) — escape hatch for bespoke children that don't fit svg/row/readout.
